test_cases.name: TC-1: Multi-line wearable activation — no promotions/add-ons (exact bug scenario) [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: New account multi-line order on UAT3; handset (iPhone SE3, PSIM, plan BFLX60) as line 1; wearable (Samsung Galaxy Watch, eSIM, plan WATCHPR) as line 2; no promotions or add-ons displayed for wearable line. | Test Data: deviceType = Wearable, IMEI = 354180649814516, EID = 89049032005007326717935616139157, inventoryType = D (ASTOCK), planSocCode = WATCHPR, promotionsSkipped = true, addonsSkipped = true, role = Store Rep, storeType = COR, stateCode = FL

steps.action: Complete wearable line 2 through configure-addons (skip promos and add-ons).
Proceed to activate-subscriber for the wearable line and observe the BE response.
steps.expected: Activation succeeds for both lines; processCompleted = true; no lastErrorDetails present.

test_cases.name: TC-2: Multi-line wearable activation — promotions and add-ons selected [Priority: Medium]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: New account multi-line order; handset on BFLX60; wearable on WATCHPR; at least one promotion and one add-on available for wearable line. | Test Data: deviceType = Wearable, inventoryType = D (ASTOCK), planSocCode = WATCHPR, promotionsSkipped = false, addonsSkipped = false, role = Store Rep, storeType = COR

steps.action: Select a promotion and an add-on for wearable line 2.
Proceed to activate-subscriber and observe the result.
steps.expected: Both lines activate; selected promotion and add-on appear in the order summary; no Metro Proxy error.

test_cases.name: TC-3: IDV-Invalid — multi-line order with wearable [Priority: Medium]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: Multi-line new account (handset + wearable); IDV configured to return Invalid for the primary subscriber. | Test Data: IDV outcome = Invalid, deviceType = Wearable, planSocCode = WATCHPR, role = Store Rep, storeType = COR

steps.action: Proceed through the activation funnel to the IDV step.
Verify the flow does not advance to activate-subscriber for either line.
steps.expected: IDV-Invalid routes to the failure screen; neither line reaches activate-subscriber.

test_cases.name: TC-4: Retry after wearable activation-failed [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: Multi-line order in activation-failed state for the wearable line; order state shows reasonCodeForAction = activation-failed and availableActions includes retry. | Test Data: processId from a prior failed wearable activation, deviceType = Wearable, planSocCode = WATCHPR, role = Store Rep, storeType = COR

steps.action: Confirm order state shows availableActions = [retry, go-back] on the wearable line.
Observe whether activate-subscriber completes successfully on retry.
steps.expected: Retry succeeds; processCompleted = true; no duplicate activation or duplicate charge occurs.

test_cases.name: TC-5: Single-line standalone wearable — regression [Priority: Medium]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: New single-line account with wearable device only; no paired handset in the order. | Test Data: deviceType = Wearable, inventoryType = D (ASTOCK), planSocCode = standalone wearable plan, role = Store Rep, storeType = COR

steps.action: Start a single-line new account with a wearable device.
Complete device, SIM, MDN, plan, promotions, and add-ons steps.
Proceed to activate-subscriber and observe the result.
steps.expected: Single-line wearable activates without the primarySubscriberForPairing error; no regression introduced by the fix.
